channel.title: FICO — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on FICO (Fair Isaac) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: David Rolfe: ADDED FICO (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Rolfe (Wedgewood Partners) added FICO in Q4 2025 · 5.9% of portfolio. Adding to credit scoring monopoly.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Rolfe)

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED FICO (+6%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added FICO in Q3 2025 · 18.7% of portfolio. Adding to credit scoring monopoly.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Dev Kantesaria)
